description: Using the open food.gdt dataset containing household survey data for 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure) and 'income' (weekly income), create a scatter plot with 'income' on the x-axis and 'food_exp' on the y-axis and save the graph to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_scatter.png.

metadata.data_source: Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed, household survey data
